payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Off-white pleated fabric shade table lamp with a scalloped, trimmed rim and an ornate white ceramic base with textured/figurative detailing; small tabletop size, visible partially cropped at the left edge of the crop and viewed from about 0.6 m away.
